seoTitle: How to Add Audio Per Slide in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to add unique audio tracks to individual slides in Canva to make presentations more engaging for lessons, pitches, and marketing.
intro: Adding audio to individual slides can make a Canva presentation feel far more dynamic than static visuals alone. This tutorial covers how to navigate Canva's audio tools and attach sound to specific slides in your presentation.

steps.heading: Navigate Canva's audio features
steps.body: Locate where audio options live within a Canva presentation project.

steps.heading: Add audio to individual slides
steps.body: Attach a specific audio track to a chosen slide rather than the entire presentation.

steps.heading: Select the right audio tracks
steps.body: Choose audio that fits the tone and purpose of each slide's content.

steps.heading: Avoid common mistakes
steps.body: Watch for pitfalls like mismatched audio length or distracting tracks that pull focus from your message.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for engagement
steps.body: Use audio thoughtfully to strengthen engagement without overwhelming your slides.

faq.question: Can each slide have different audio in Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, this feature lets you assign unique audio tracks to individual slides rather than one track for the whole presentation.

faq.question: Who benefits most from adding audio per slide?
faq.answer: Teachers, business professionals, and marketers creating interactive lessons or compelling pitches benefit most.

faq.question: Is this feature beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial is structured so users with no prior experience can follow along easily.

faq.question: Can audio per slide help with virtual events?
faq.answer: Yes, this functionality can help automate presentations for virtual events by adding audio without needing a live narrator.
